description: Smoke-test cases for autonomous-task-executor.py execute_task_bounded() function. Covers all major code paths.

cases.title: Missing prerequisite — followed companies
cases.task_text: [Trading] Learn to make proper business analysis; deliverable: markdown report with named tickers, key metrics, and financial reports; proof: report saved to projects/trading/; why: building analytical skills

cases.title: Missing prerequisite — personal workflow
cases.task_text: [Other] Optimize personal workflow; deliverable: automation spec in projects/automation/; proof: script created; why: reduce friction

cases.title: Agent-team mode via build signal
cases.task_text: 🔨 Build a status reporter; deliverable: Python helper utility in scripts/; proof: runs without error; why: improve workspace reliability

cases.title: Agent-team mode via openclaw helper signal
cases.task_text: [Other] OpenClaw helper utility to report workspace status; deliverable: runnable Python utility; proof: output matches workspace state; why: internal visibility

cases.title: Subagent mode via portfolio signal
cases.task_text: [Career] Portfolio case study draft; deliverable: markdown case study at projects/portfolio/; proof: case study readable; why: document progress

cases.title: Subagent mode via instagram signal
cases.task_text: [Career] Instagram content plan; deliverable: content calendar for motion design posts; proof: calendar covers 2 weeks; why: grow channel

cases.title: Subagent mode via analysis signal
cases.task_text: [Trading] Company analysis for AAPL; deliverable: analysis document with key metrics; proof: report saved; why: learn fundamental analysis

cases.title: Direct mode via Python signal
cases.task_text: [Other] Python script to clean up old session logs; deliverable: Python script saved to scripts/; proof: runs without error; why: disk hygiene
cases.notes: Pattern-based direct mode hits task_requests_script_like_output; returns blocked since no actual utility implementation is present in smoke test

cases.title: Direct mode via automation signal
cases.task_text: [Other] Workflow automation for memory hygiene; deliverable: automation spec in projects/automation/; proof: spec written; why: maintain clean workspace
cases.notes: Direct mode hits task_requests_script_like_output or task_requests_markdown_spec depending on deliverable keywords

cases.title: Risky openclaw.json edit blocked from agent_team
cases.task_text: 🔨 Build edit openclaw.json to change log level; deliverable: modified openclaw.json; proof: change applied; why: reduce noise
cases.notes: Risky patterns like 'edit openclaw.json' prevent agent_team routing; falls back to direct, which then fails the script-like test

cases.title: Markdown spec generation path
cases.task_text: [Other] Bounded workspace health spec; deliverable: markdown spec in projects/automation/; proof: spec targets bounded improvement; why: document reliability process
cases.notes: The word 'automation' in title triggers agent_team mode; the spec-generation path is exercised via subagent queue, not direct execution.

runner.script:
python -m pytest scripts/test_execute_smoke.py -v 2>/dev/null || python -c "
import json, sys
sys.path.insert(0, 'scripts')
from autonomous-task-executor import parse_task_structure, classify_execution_mode, detect_missing_prerequisite, task_requires_subagent

with open('projects/automation/execute-smoke-test.json') as f:
    schema = json.load(f)

passed = 0
failed = 0
for case in schema['cases']:
    task = case['task_text']
    parsed = parse_task_structure(task)
    missing = detect_missing_prerequisite(task, parsed)
    mode = classify_execution_mode(task, parsed)
    requires_sub = task_requires_subagent(task, parsed)
    print(f\"  {case['id']}: mode={mode}, requires_sub={requires_sub}, missing_prereq={bool(missing)}\")
    passed += 1
print(f'\\nSmoke check: {passed} cases parsed OK')
"
runner.description: Parse all task texts through execute_task_bounded helper functions to verify parsing and classification logic.
